checks.name: NetBox reference validation — total candidate count

checks.name: centrality data key compatibility
checks.description: All centrality lookups use entry.get('path', entry.get('file', '')) — handles both key conventions

checks.name: no pipeline mutation without hero moment detector

checks.name: no interpretation or ranking in detection
